a:T1114,<div class="specification">
<p>The figure represents a section of DNA.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify the first triplet of nucleotides of each of the three reading frames in the 5’ to 3’ direction.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Open reading frames have start and stop codons. State <strong>one</strong> other characteristic of open reading frames.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Explain how marker genes are used in genetic modification.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State <strong>one</strong> physical method that could be used to introduce a gene into a plant.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>b:T682,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>«frame 1 =» ATG</p>
<p>«frame 2 =» TGC ✔</p>
<p>«frame 3 =» GCC</p>
<p><em>All three required.</em><br/><em>Order of frames is not relevant.</em><br/><em>Do not accept RNA, e.g. AUG.</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>continuous stretch of codons «between start and stop codon»<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>can contain introns<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>sufficient nucleotides to code for a polypeptide chain ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. «marker genes» are attached to target genes and inserted into bacteria/host cells ✔ <em>OWTTE</em></p>
<p>b. «marker genes» confirm that the target gene has been successfully integrated into the genome/ plasmid ✔</p>
<p>c. «marker genes» for antibiotic resistance/fluorescence ✔</p>
<p>d. antibiotic is added to the media used to grow the bacteria<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>UV light is used «to detect fluorescence» ✔</p>
<p>e. genetically modified bacteria will survive<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>successful transgenic organisms will fluoresce<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>allow researchers to identify the bacteria that have been modified ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>electroporation<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>microinjection<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>biolistics/gene gun/gunshot ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/b/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","b"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.3.HL.TZ0.9"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","b-2-biotechnology-in-agriculture"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">d.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
